codeReview.summary: Compared the original failed cross-surface review with the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and current test targets. The fix closes both prior blockers: `src/app/__tests__/root-layout-chrome.test.tsx` now invokes `RootLayout` and asserts rendered header/footer chrome instead of a page-only proxy or local string literal, and `src/components/tokenomics/__tests__/preview-eligibility-copy.test.tsx` now scopes assertions to each rendered `Preview Priority` field plus the exact `Strategy Preview Slots` rule copy, including explicit Whale and Apex wording.

summary: Review passed. This rerun fix adequately addresses the original blocking scrutiny findings by making the shared-chrome suite RootLayout-aware and binding preview-eligibility assertions to the specific rendered field and scarcity copy they were meant to protect.
